en.name: Asutrashen Trichiliocosm
en.effect: You can target any number of face-down cards you control; add "Asutra" cards from your Deck to your hand with different names from each other, except Field Spells, equal to the number of those targeted cards that are still face-down, then send those face-down cards to the GY. If a card(s) becomes Set on the field, while you control an "Asutra" monster and a face-down card: You can target 1 card on the field; return it to the hand. You can only use each effect of "Asutrashen Trichiliocosm" once per turn.

ja.name: 艮神鬼門 三千世界

zh-CN.name: 艮鬼神门 三千世界
zh-CN.effect: 此卡名的①②效果1回合仅可各使用1次。①：以自己场上任意数量的里侧表示卡为对象可以发动。依该里侧表示卡的数量，从牌组将场地魔法卡以外的“艮鬼”卡加入手牌（同名卡最多1张）。然后，将对象的里侧表示卡送至墓地。②：自己场上存在“艮鬼”怪兽及里侧表示卡的状态下，有卡被放置到场上的情况下，以场上的1张卡为对象可以发动。将该卡放回手牌。
